_meta.description: Complete football analysis data for Claude AI agent. This ONE file replaces all web fetches.
_meta.usage: Upload this file as Project Knowledge in Claude.ai Projects. The agent reads it directly — no web_fetch needed.
_meta.data_sections: matches, referees, injuries, lineups, player_stats, event_timing
